description_long: This is a full-size, rectangular computer keyboard with a standard key layout, including a numeric keypad on the right. The keyboard is predominantly black, with slightly raised, square keys that feature white alphanumeric and function labels. The surface appears to be made of matte plastic, giving it a modern and professional look. The keys are closely spaced, and the overall build is slim and low-profile, with a slight incline from front to back for ergonomic typing. There is a visible brand logo on the top right corner, and the keyboard does not show any visible cable or wireless receiver attachment. The object appears clean and free of wear, suggesting it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A sleek, black full-size keyboard with white-labeled keys and a numeric keypad, featuring a matte plastic finish and a slim, modern profile.
description_view_0: Side view showing the keyboard's slim profile and slight incline from front to back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full key layout, including the alphanumeric section and numeric keypad.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the keys.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the numeric keypad and the brand logo on the top right.
